description_long: This is a cylindrical plant pot with a rustic, unglazed clay appearance and a slightly uneven rim. The exterior surface is matte and textured, featuring hand-drawn black lines and geometric motifs, including a circle with a white mark and a rectangular patch with a blue tint. The pot has a small, raised rectangular section on one side, possibly for decorative or structural reinforcement. The color is predominantly a natural, earthy brown with some darker and lighter areas due to the hand-applied patterns. The interior is plain and matches the exterior's clay tone, and the pot appears sturdy and thick-walled.
description: A rustic, cylindrical clay plant pot with hand-drawn black geometric patterns and a matte, textured brown surface.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main geometric black line pattern and the slightly uneven rim.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the raised rectangular patch with a blue tint and part of the black line motif.
description_view_2: Back view displays a black circle with a white mark and a continuation of the line pattern.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals a mostly plain brown surface with a faint horizontal line.
attribute_placement_context: commonly used in rustic gardens or patios for decorative planting
attribute_decorative_pattern: hand-drawn geometric lines and a circle motif
